name: Kaiju Girls
description:
Los Angeles is getting wrecked—again. This time, it’s not just earthquakes or wildfires. Two rival gangs of Kaiju Girls are duking it out across the city, and nobody’s holding back.

On one side, you’ve got the Neo-Xilian Vanguard—a crew of ruthless, power-hungry monsters who don’t care who gets crushed in their wake. Standing against them? Team Goji, Earth’s last line of defense.

Buildings are collapsing, streets are flooding with acid, and the sky’s lit up with energy blasts. The whole city’s a warzone, and if Team Goji doesn’t shut this down fast, LA—and maybe the world—is toast.

No rules. No mercy. Just giant monster girls throwing down in the ultimate kaiju brawl.
creator: TheGreatLiar2
